hero.subtitle: Because Africa deserves clean, modern, and smart cities.
hero.description: Ekolo connects citizens and municipalities to detect, analyze, and treat urban pollution in real-time.

footer.description: Collective intelligence serving a cleaner world. Reporting, AI analysis, rapid intervention.
footer.copyright: © 2026 EKOLO — All rights reserved. Smart environmental platform.

problem.title: Environmental Challenges in Urban Africa
problem.subtitle: Urban pollution remains one of the major environmental challenges in African cities. Without appropriate tools, the response remains fragmented and inefficient.

list.title: Growing Pollution
list.desc: Illegal dumping is increasing in African urban areas, overwhelming existing collection systems and threatening public health.

list.title: Lack of Coordination
list.desc: Municipalities, NGOs, and citizens act in silos, without a common tool to centralize reports and coordinate actions.

list.title: Delayed Interventions
list.desc: Without an early detection system, pollution hotspots expand before being addressed, multiplying intervention costs.

list.title: Decentralized Data
list.desc: Environmental data is scattered, making any strategic analysis and informed decision-making at scale impossible.

solution.title: How it works
solution.subtitle: EKOLO simplifies the environmental treatment chain in 4 clear steps, from reporting to intervention.

steps.title: Photo/Video Reporting
steps.desc: Citizens report in real-time via the multilingual mobile app with automatic geolocation. Built-in AI facilitates reporting and automatically identifies waste types. Reward system and ecological campaigns motivate participation.

steps.title: AI Analysis
steps.desc: Our artificial intelligence engine accurately classifies waste types, assesses the reliability of each report, and prioritizes interventions in milliseconds for an optimal response.

steps.title: Multilingual Strategic Dashboard
steps.desc: Authorities view the incident map, trends, and priority areas in real time. AI provides accurate analytics on waste types and report reliability. Interface available in all local languages.

steps.title: Rapid Intervention
steps.desc: Field teams receive automated and optimized missions with all detailed information (waste type, reliability, priority), drastically reducing intervention times.

impact.title: A smart ecosystem for Africa
impact.subtitle: EKOLO aims to build a bridge between citizens, authorities, and technology for more sustainable African cities.

cards.title: Smart Citizen Reporting
cards.description: Multilingual mobile app with built-in AI to automatically identify waste types. Reward systems and ecological campaigns to maximize citizen participation.

cards.title: Community Engagement
cards.description: Mobilizing communities using local African languages, targeted ecological campaigns, and motivating reward systems for a cleaner urban environment.

cards.title: Precise Intervention
cards.description: Multilingual AI dashboard that evaluates the reliability of reports and determines exact waste types, enabling optimal coordination of field teams.

cards.title: Predictive AI Analysis
cards.description: Artificial intelligence that classifies reports, assesses reliability, identifies waste types, and predicts high-risk areas to optimize municipal resources.

impact.vision_desc: EKOLO adapts the latest AI and data analytics technologies to the realities of African cities. Our platform speeds up interventions, facilitates reporting, and creates a virtuous circle of continuous improvement for a healthier urban environment.

prototypes.title: Explore the EKOLO ecosystem
prototypes.subtitle: Access the platform's various interfaces and functional prototypes.

cards.title: EKOLO Citizen App
cards.desc: Multilingual app with built-in AI for easy reporting: automatic waste type identification, geolocation, photo. Reward systems and ecological campaigns to motivate citizens. Available in all local African languages.

cards.title: Municipal Command Center
cards.desc: Multilingual overview interface with AI analysis: precision on waste type, assessment of report reliability, field team management, and advanced analytical reports. Adapted to all local languages.

cards.title: Municipalities
